role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified lack of visible text/script and abstained from analysis.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, soil color, and vegetation density.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant types (ruderal grasses, scrub) and biome characteristics.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road construction (concrete slabs) and utility infrastructure.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized infrastructure styles (pole design) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline followed a logical path but failed due to a hallucinated visual feature (the double-crossarm pole) which drove the meta/regulatory agents to incorrectly favor Colombia over the true location (Peru).

regulatory: claimed 'utility pole with multiple horizontal cross-arms' (specifically double-crossarm) — the image shows a single cross-arm.
meta: claimed 'concrete utility pole with double-crossarm' — the image shows a single cross-arm.

visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Failed to accurately describe the utility pole structure.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Failed to accurately describe the utility pole structure.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The meta and regulatory agents hallucinated a 'double-crossarm' pole design that was not present in the image. This fabricated evidence led them to strongly support Colombia (the winner) and reject Peru (the truth), setting up the tournament to fail.
